name: disaster-dashboard
description: Disaster Awareness Dashboard - One command to run

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.install-ai: cd ai-service && python3 -m venv venv 2>/dev/null || python -m venv venv && (venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt || venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt)
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client,ai -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "node start-ai.js"
